mapper.sql: e.id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, e.gender, e.nationality, e.dept_id, e.first_use_date, e.phone, e.email, e.hire_date, e.resign_date, e.emp_status, e.version, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, d.dept_name AS deptName
FROM tbl_employee e LEFT JOIN tbl_department d ON e.dept_id = d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_employee ( emp_no, emp_name, gender, nationality, dept_id, first_use_date, phone, email, hire_date, emp_status, version, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{empNo}, #{empName}, COALESCE(#{gender}, 'MALE'), COALESCE(#{nationality}, '中国'), #{deptId}, #{firstUseDate}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{hireDate}, COALESCE(#{empStatus}, 1), 0, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_employee
emp_name = #{empName},
gender = #{gender},
nationality = #{nationality},
dept_id = #{deptId},
first_use_date = #{firstUseDate},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
hire_date = #{hireDate},
resign_date = #{resignDate},
emp_status = #{empStatus},
version = version + 1,
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
